errors.galleryPermissionRequired: We need gallery access to pick photos.

memories.title: Memories
memories.emptyForDay: No memories for this day yet.

home.cameraPermissionRequired: We need camera access to take photos.

aiTools.title: AI tools
aiTools.rewriteGuidance: Make it one sentence, under 180 characters, and safe to share.
aiTools.rewriteReady: This rewrite is ready to use.
aiTools.loadingExplain: Reading the feeling behind your quote…
aiTools.loadingFuture: Writing the next quote you may need…
aiTools.editQuoteHint: Tap the quote to edit it.
aiTools.editQuoteGuidance: Keep it to one sentence, under 180 characters, and safe to use.

subscription.aiLimitReachedTitle: You reached today's free AI limit.
subscription.aiLimitReachedBody: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited quote generations.
subscription.personaLockedBody: Upgrade to unlock advanced persona controls.
subscription.paywallHeroTitle: Create better quote cards without limits
subscription.paywallHeroSubtitle: Unlimited quotes, exports, and premium styles.
subscription.paywallBullet1: Generate as many AI quotes as you want — no daily cap.
subscription.paywallBullet2: Export and share quote cards without limits.
subscription.paywallBullet3: Unlock every theme and remove the watermark.
subscription.aiLimitPaywallBody: You've used today's free generations. Pro unlocks unlimited AI quotes so you never hit a wall.
subscription.exportLimitPaywallBody: You've reached today's export limit. Pro lets you export and share as many cards as you want.
subscription.premiumThemePaywallBody: Pro opens every premium layout and style so your cards always look polished.
subscription.personaPaywallBody: Pro unlocks full persona controls so the AI matches your voice.
subscription.noPlansAvailable: We couldn't load subscription plans. Check your connection and try again, or open the App Store / Play Store and try later.
subscription.alreadyProToast: Pro is already active on this account.
subscription.purchaseSuccessToast: Subscription active — you're on Pro now.
subscription.purchaseFailedToast: We couldn't complete the purchase. Please try again.
subscription.purchaseVerifyLater: Purchase received. If Pro doesn't unlock in a minute, tap Restore purchases.
subscription.restoreSuccessToast: Pro restored — your subscription is active.
subscription.restoreFailedToast: We couldn't restore purchases. Please try again.
subscription.restoreNoActiveToast: No active subscription found for this account.
subscription.footerReassurance: Payments are processed by Apple or Google. You can cancel anytime in Settings.
subscription.statusLoadingPlansBody: We're fetching live prices and plans from Apple or Google. This usually takes a few seconds.
subscription.statusPurchasingBody: Stay on this screen. You may be asked to confirm with Face ID, Touch ID, or your store password.
subscription.statusRestoringBody: We're checking your account for an active subscription. This may take a moment.
subscription.ctaHelperIos: You'll confirm with Face ID, Touch ID, or your Apple ID.
subscription.ctaHelperAndroid: You'll confirm with your Google Play account on the next screen.

profile.reminderDescription: One notification per day at the time you pick.
profile.reminderNotificationToast: Turn on notifications in system settings to get your daily reminder.
profile.nameTooLong: Name must be 40 characters or less.
profile.photoAccessRequired: Please allow photo access to update your avatar.
